name: apk-management
description: APK versioning and icon extraction for a sideload distribution page. Auto-extracts ic_launcher.png from APKs, has an icon library for obfuscated APKs, and a version endpoint for auto-update.

envVars.name: LATEST_APK_VERSION
envVars.description: Server-side override of APP_VERSION. Set on deploy so the client knows there's an update available.

postInstall: 1. Set APP_VERSION in lib/appVersion.ts (same as your Capacitor android build version)
2. Place APK files under $UPLOADS_DIR/apk/ (uploaded via file-upload-storage)
3. Icons are extracted automatically on the first request to /api/apk-icon/[filename]
4. For obfuscated APKs — drop manual icons into $UPLOADS_DIR/icons/ and select via /api/apk-icon/upload
5. apkDownload.ts is client-side (Capacitor) — omit if you're not building an Android app
